1.description: get Lillestrøm municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get quick-clay release areas (utlosningomr) geometry and ids

3.description: reduce quick-clay areas to Lillestrøm municipality extent

4.description: get parcels (teig) in Lillestrøm municipality with representative point

5.description: get 1km grid cells geometry and ids

6.description: find parcels that intersect reduced quick-clay areas (parcels in quick-clay)

7.description: assign each parcel-in-quick-clay to its 1km grid cell

8.description: count parcels per grid cell and get top 5 sorted by parcel count desc
